boy.description: teenage boy, slim build, wearing a blue hooded raincoat, dark pants, wet hair partly hidden under hood, cautious expression

refs.note: wide shot, walking through puddles, head lowered, blue hooded raincoat

cat.description: small gray cat, sleek body, bright eyes, wet fur, expressive face, curled tail

rainy_street.description: quiet city street at night, heavy rain, puddles reflecting streetlights, narrow sidewalk and shadowy alley entrance

refs.note: wide establishing view, empty rainy night street with puddle reflections
